title: Abaseen Coir Door Mats | Heavy Duty Cut to Size Natural Coir Entrance Door Mat for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Non Slip Rubber Back, Thick Coconut Fiber Bristles, Pet Friendly Dirt Trap Design
features: 𝑪𝒖𝒔𝒕𝒐𝒎𝒊𝒛𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝑪𝒖𝒕-𝒕𝒐-𝑺𝒊𝒛𝒆 𝑫𝒆𝒔𝒊𝒈𝒏 – This versatile coir mat can be easily trimmed to fit any entrance, doorway, or patio, ensuring a perfect fit for your space while maintaining a clean and polished look. Whether for home or commercial use, it adapts seamlessly to various entryways.

𝑯𝒆𝒂𝒗𝒚 𝑫𝒖𝒕𝒚 & 𝑫𝒖𝒓𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝑪𝒐𝒊𝒓 𝑩𝒓𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒍𝒆𝒔 – Crafted from 1.7cm thick natural coconut fibers, this entrance mat effectively scrapes off dirt, mud, and debris from shoes and boots, keeping your indoor floors spotless. Its tough bristles ensure long-lasting performance, even in high-traffic areas.

𝑵𝒐𝒏-𝑺𝒍𝒊𝒑 𝑹𝒖𝒃𝒃𝒆𝒓 𝑩𝒂𝒄𝒌𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝑺𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒊𝒍𝒊𝒕𝒚 – Designed with a sturdy rubber backing, this coir mat stays securely in place, preventing slipping or shifting on different floor surfaces. The non-slip feature enhances safety, making it ideal for homes, offices, and commercial spaces.

𝑾𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒓 𝑹𝒆𝒔𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒏𝒕 & 𝑨𝒍𝒍 𝑺𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒐𝒏 𝑼𝒔𝒆 – Built to withstand rain, snow, and heavy foot traffic, this mat is perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. Whether placed at the front door, patio, or garden entrance, it maintains its effectiveness and durability in all weather conditions.

𝑬𝒄𝒐 𝑭𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅𝒍𝒚 & 𝑷𝒆𝒕 𝑭𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅𝒍𝒚 𝑫𝒆𝒔𝒊𝒈𝒏 – Made from biodegradable coconut fibers, this mat is an environmentally conscious choice for any home or business. Its natural composition makes it safe for pets while effectively trapping moisture and dirt from their paws, reducing mess inside your home.
description: Abaseen Cut-to-Size Coir Matting – Heavy-Duty Entrance Door Mat for Indoor & Outdoor Use Enhance your entrance with the Abaseen Cut-to-Size Coir Matting , a durable and stylish solution designed for both indoor and outdoor use . Crafted from thick natural coir bristles and featuring a non-slip rubber backing, this high-quality doormat is perfect for trapping dirt, mud, and moisture, keeping your home clean and welcoming. ✨ Key Features & Benefits: Customizable Size: Easily cut the coir mat to fit any doorway or entrance, ensuring a perfect fit for your home or business. Versatile & Functional: Ideal for high-traffic areas such as entrances, patios, doorways, and hallways. Suitable for all weather conditions. Thick & Durable Coir Bristles: The 17mm thick natural coconut fiber bristles effectively remove dirt, mud, and debris from shoes and boots. Non-Slip Rubber Backing: Provides stability and prevents slipping, ensuring the mat stays in place on various floor surfaces. Easy Maintenance: Simply shake, brush, or vacuum the mat to remove dirt and debris for long-lasting cleanliness. Eco-Friendly Material: Made from 100% natural coconut fibers , a renewable and biodegradable material, making it an environmentally friendly choice. Pet-Friendly Design: Effectively traps moisture and dirt from pet paws, keeping your floors clean and mess-free. Stylish & Decorative: Complements any home decor while adding a welcoming touch to your entrance. 🛠 How to Use: Measure your entrance area to determine the required mat size. Use scissors or a utility knife to cut the coir mat to your desired dimensions. Place the mat on a clean, dry surface with the rubber backing facing down. Shake or brush off dirt regularly to maintain its appearance. 📦 Package Includes: 1 x Abaseen Cut-to-Size Coir Mat Whether you need a reliable entrance mat for your home, office, or business, the Abaseen Cut-to-Size Coir Matting offers durability, style, and superior performance. Order yours today and keep your floors spotless while enhancing your entrance space!
